subject: Honey — a trainer card depicting a young female-presenting figure in a green outfit posed outdoors against a bright blue sky.
description: A young humanoid figure in a green long-sleeved outfit stands against a bright blue sky with soft clouds. The figure has brown hair and is posed with one hand raised near the face, looking upward or into the distance in a cheerful, aspirational manner. The composition is a mid-shot from below, giving a heroic or uplifting feel. The card has a Supporter type border. The overall mood is warm and optimistic.
foreground: young humanoid figure in green outfit, hand raised, looking up
background: bright blue sky with soft white clouds
